name: Tadano Ltd.
summary: Tadano Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, produces, distributes, and services lifting equipment worldwide. The company offers all terrain, rough terrain, truck, crawler, and cargo cranes; aerial work platforms, such as truck mounted aerial work and self-propelled aerial work platforms; special purpose vehicles comprising bridge inspection vehicles and digger derricks; and used equipment. It also provides components, such as hydraulic cylinders, as well as repair and maintenance services. The company was formerly known as Tadano Iron Works Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tadano Ltd. in 1989. Tadano Ltd. was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Takamatsu, Japan.
